beats: 林澈推开公寓门，雨水从外套滴落
厨房灯突然亮起，林澈愣住
林澈环顾空荡荡的厨房，表情困惑

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 午夜的雨把旧公寓包成一只黑盒。林澈回家时，厨房灯自己亮着。

prompt.positive: Night, rain outside window, dim kitchen interior, single overhead light on, young man in wet coat standing in doorway, surprised expression, cinematic lighting, moody atmosphere, film grain
